title: Edgar Gonzalez Martinez
text: Welcome to my portfolio! I am a recent UCSB Statistics and Data Science graduate with experience in time series modeling, machine learning, and applied statistical analysis. Below are some of my recent projects. Check them out!

title: Edgar Gonzalez Martinez
text:
Featured Projects

Ventura County Wildfire Time Series
Investigation into Ventura County wildfire occurrence using NOAA and NASA POWER datasets. Develops SARIMA and ARMAX frameworks incorporating drought index lags, vapor pressure deficit, and temperature predictors.

Keywords: R, SARIMA, ARMAX, NASA POWER, Environmental Modeling



Pokémon Tournament Simulation Tool
Python data pipeline that parses tournament structure, simulates match mechanics, and analyzes competitive trainer data.

title: Edgar Gonzalez Martinez
text:
Technical Skills

Languages: R, Python, SQL, Git/Bash
Libraries: tidyverse, forecast, scikit-learn, pandas, ggplot2
Methodologies: Time Series Forecasting, Regression Analysis, Simulation Modeling, Dimensionality Reduction (PCA)
Tools: Quarto, GitHub Pages, LaTeX
